title: dryopteris affinis var. setosa
intro: Dryopteris affinis var. setosa, also known as the scaly male fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the Dryopteridaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of this plant include relief from various conditions such as arthritis, rheumatism, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to aid in digestion and reduce fever. Dryopteris affinis var. setosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional folk medicine for its potential to reduce blood pressure and improve overall well-being.
